allow: Bash(perl -ne 'if\(/showreel_section/\){ my $i=index\($_,"showreel_section"\); print substr\($_,$i,1100\),"\\n"; }' 'Ariyana Studio - Webflow HTML website template.html')
Bash(perl -0777 -ne 'my $i=index\($_,".mov"\); print substr\($_,$i-260,340\),"\\n";' 'Ariyana Studio - Webflow HTML website template.html')
Bash(perl -0777 -ne 'my $i=index\($_,"service%20video%201"\); print substr\($_,$i-160,260\),"\\n";' 'Ariyana Studio - Webflow HTML website template.html')
